objective: Add Campaign Wizard provider/domain selectors and inline readiness checks
validationPlan: cd frontend; npm run lint; npm run build:ci; .\node_modules\.bin\playwright.cmd test tests/e2e/campaign-engine.spec.ts --project=chromium --reporter=line
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
outcome: Campaign Wizard now loads tenant/workspace-scoped provider and sender-domain catalogs, replaces raw provider/domain text fields with selectors, shows inline provider/domain/sender readiness, blocks approval/send on blocked delivery readiness, and preserves selected provider/domain in create payloads.
residualRisks: Wizard readiness uses provider health and sender-domain catalog data only; deeper deliverability auth-check evidence from /deliverability/auth/checks remains a future enhancement before production send claims.
